e":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"subjectCount","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"subject","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"subjectVersion","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint64","name":"","type":"uint64"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"subject","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"predicate","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"updatedAt","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint64","name":"","type":"uint64"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"roundSubject","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"proposalSubject","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"nullifier","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"voteSubject","outputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"stateMutability":"pure","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"title":"VoteRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"On-chain authoritative store for ballots. Each ballot row carries         only an AnonCreds **nullifier** \u2014 never a voter identity \u2014 so the         public ledger reveals what was voted on a round, the tally, and         (via nullifier replay protection) that no credential voted twice,         without identifying which member cast which ballot. Subject = keccak256(\"sa:vote:\", roundSubject, nullifier) so the same (round, credential) pair always maps to the same subject \u2014 re-casting (vote-change pre-finalize) UPDATEs the row in place instead of inserting a duplicate. Auth: only the round's fund-owner AgentAccount can cast or mutate a vote (delegated, in practice, to the org-mcp gateway via its session delegation). The gateway verifies the AnonCreds presentation off-chain BEFORE making the call; the chain doesn't re-verify the proof, it trusts the gateway as the publisher. This matches the architecture decision in spec 004 (verifier-mcp / org-mcp split).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/VoteRegistry.sol":"VoteRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AttributeStorage.sol":{"keccak256":"0x7341a522a1028951103aea6651a99114d50aab0f9fe8ab0cef67a55530224f34","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://84ef067ef1094b436bcfdfa1a2c4d9594799bd5c01eb889db40720eac71002f2","dweb:/ipfs/QmPoHx6mWjiJut6DLgJvfXc7TUVL91bHzp3qYyxUNCo6KR"]},"src/OntologyTermRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x0cd6011124337410a2aac87ccbbeac634a8a14e85e4f4d10e8d49836325bea9c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://583303d503ff402b433da8a7f89592b927066ee82e978217663476fdb2a2566c","dweb:/ipfs/QmVjSUx2LYZsZrZ9xAotkQpFkw7yB7Gnw9BzScZzW2mYjz"]},"src/ShapeRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xd46ce253774daf9378599d57cd76173dd96195d56362bfef5df0f9f65afdb71f","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f1664e76045c1d9317c8e21df6d65bb557eaa2159bc604dafd174996ea30b318","dweb:/ipfs/QmXUFyDfwG1vAh2x6U2d2gVcna65ezPmgJughf8E5pNvmE"]},"src/VoteRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf7e0a5a85fb67368164ef72c5bfcaec78964edb992e0ec58c881569c981b0358","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://986b02371be50cdc1075a693e66dd3e7a28e8c6a9d48b7ccba1f90370544bde5","dweb:/ipfs/QmR8tTLtSE6cjSdoBoVS32NVPJjycEt18rYV1W7Ps2kKMf"]}},"version":1}
